name: Greek Yogurt

pros.title: excellent dairy-category fit
pros.explanation: Strong protein usefulness with a clean dairy identity makes it a textbook high-performing dairy food.

pros.title: quite filling for the calories
pros.explanation: The protein density gives it strong practical satiety value.

pros.title: easy high-protein staple
pros.explanation: Very easy to build meals or snacks around.

cons.title: saturated fat is not trivial
cons.explanation: Still much cleaner than weak dairy foods, but not ultra-low-fat.

cons.title: not suitable for everyone
cons.explanation: Lactose tolerance and dairy tolerance vary.

cons.title: healthiness can shift with toppings
cons.explanation: Sugary add-ins can change the practical outcome fast.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate placeholders for tuning only.
